CONTENT.Career: On 8 July 2017, Ligue 1 side Lille announced the signing of Mendes on a five-year contract. The transfer fee was reported as "worth up to €9 million" after being signed by manager Marcelo Bielsa.On 3 July 2019, Mendes signed for Ligue 1 club Lyon.

SUMMARY: Thiago Henrique Mendes Ribeiro (born 15 March 1992) is a Brazilian professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder and centre-back for Qatar Stars League club Al-Rayyan.
